---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## What would you like?

<!-- Describe the feature clearly. One paragraph is enough. -->

## Why is this useful?

<!-- What workflow does it enable? Who benefits? Research / clinical / educational? -->

## Proposed implementation (optional)

<!-- If you have ideas about how it should work technically, describe them here.
     Which module would it live in? What API? Any libraries involved? -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Have you tried working around this with the current app?
     Are there other viewers that do this well? -->

## Would you be willing to implement this?

- [ ] Yes, I can open a PR
- [ ] I can help test it
- [ ] Just suggesting — happy for someone else to implement it
